blocks.text: Hard lesson (twice): Raducanu **lost R2** so Sabalenka's R3 was Potapova (−0.05); and despite "India gets invite" news, Pakistan actually joined the Board of Peace (−0.05). **News/draw signals are probabilistic, not deterministic** — over-concentrating on them cost ~15 points (TW +85.28). I'll cap even signal-driven picks at ~0.15. Let me lightly scan the 10 resolving tomorrow without over-concentrating.

input.command:
for d in 2026/01/19 2026/01/20; do
  f="articles/$d/articles.jsonl"; [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== $d ==="
  cat "$f" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
kw=re.compile(r'three-way.*(talks|medial)|(ukraine|russia).*(turkey|saudi|qatar|istanbul|riyadh)|tiktok.*(ceo|entity|joint|us)|deloitte.*(money league|2024-25)|osaka.*(australian|third)',re.I)
seen=set()
for line in sys.stdin:
    try: a=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    t=a.get('title','')
    if kw.search(t) and t not in seen:
        seen.add(t); print(' -',(a.get('source','?'))[:16],'|',t[:125])
" | head -10
done
